---
title: "Week 7 - Chapter 6"
format: html
editor: visual
---

:::::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Announcements and Agenda

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Welcome! We will get started soon. In the meantime, please complete the following :**

-   **Spring Break in Two Weeks.** Whew!
-   **R Exam in Three Weeks (After Spring Break.)** Yikes! We will practice :)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
-   **8:55 - 9:20.** Check-In and Review
-   **9:20 - 10:00.** Linear Models Review
-   **10:00 - 10:10.** BREAK TIME
-   **10:10 - 11:00.** Working in Quarto for on Lab 5
:::
:::::
::::::

### Class Slides and Materials

```{=html}
<iframe data-external="1" class="slide-deck" src="/dvcstats/slides/ch6.html" width="100%" height="500px" title=""></iframe>
```

-   **CHECK-IN : [Working with the Mini Class Dataset (see below)](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe-830Xaq_jAfRomviIR6CrIaurGYB_hUJcRYbLFXQfeASI4A/viewform?usp=header)**
-   **DATA (AND CODEBOOK) FOR TODAY : [Mini Class](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/5gzf195h8r3n8kh05miym/AKkVJKMDik5gM600FBPk_Yc?rlkey=acd199vikc6um4ufl0g9595od&dl=0)**
-   **Professor R Scripts \[[Zoom Room](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/ofchakmk3d1ep17u2r5r5/APTz8gRoQo9AHhw2XPY5TZs?rlkey=mdept9ym448grm4vya184bbrd&dl=0) + [Room Crew](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/fa4okobq89jhhj0wthgy5/AHJsWr-fakA7N8JnlLZHKIs?rlkey=hfw992f7lj8nzfbcz6qp7n2og&dl=0)\]**

### Lab 5

1.  Choose two numeric variables from the mini class dataset. Determine whether there is a relationship between the two variables. Make sure to include a graph of the variables, a graph of your model and the relevant statistics.
2.  Repeat the steps above for two other numeric variables.
